name: sci-research
description: Claude Code plugin for country-level daily news intelligence, multi-country branded briefings, and company reputation tracking with authoritative references

metadata.description: Three independent pipelines — single-country daily news intelligence, multi-country branded briefing, and company reputation tracking — powered by specialised agents with source credibility grading, per-URL date verification, editorial-desk filtering, branded docx generation, HTML email rendering, and automated quality gates

plugins.name: sci-research
plugins.description: Three independent pipelines: (1) /daily-news-intelligence — dated single-country daily news briefing in zh/en/ja (and 1.18.0+ bilingual combinations like zh+en / en+zh / zh+ja / ja+zh / en+ja / ja+en — Scanner/Verifier/Fact-Extractor run once and Writer/Editor fan out per language in parallel, with stacked bilingual email body and doubled attachment count) from a single daily-news-scanner (Pass A Source-Matrix ladder + Pass B free-discovery under a Source-Legitimacy rubric per category, all active categories processed sequentially, then internal cross-category dedup + Cat5↔Cat6 routing in § Step 6; hard-paywall outlets Lead-eligible with Writer body-fill obligation) → news-verifier → daily-fact-extractor → daily-news-writer → daily-editor with per-URL WebFetch date verification, T1-T4 source gating, editorial-desk filtering (originality + authority + impact + source legitimacy + dedup), Fact Manifest (locked numbers/dates/names/quotes), Writer with WebSearch background enrichment (≥2 calls mandatory when Lead is paywall-stub) and mandatory citation of every supporting URL in References, five-pass fact-check editor (Verifier-locked drift / Writer-search backing / quote verbatim / canonical quote marks / local-fluency + logic-gap repair), country-derived conditional category coverage (6 categories for most countries; 7 for a China report which adds China-Nexus Finance & Investment, plus a universal Corporate IPO & M&A category), and APA 7th references; (2) /daily-briefing — multi-country branded SPD Bank briefing curated from existing daily reports and rendered to docx with email delivery; (3) /reputation-track — company reputation monitoring across News (T1-T4) + Reddit + X with adverse-media classification, severity scoring, and HTML email alerts sent only when negative findings exist
